summary:
Posterior seating of the final impression tray is preferred due to superior alignment with the anteroposterior anatomy and enhanced stability, which minimizes distortion during impression acquisition. This ensures accurate reproduction of posterior structures prior to detailed anterior registration.  

\boxed{B}
